title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños Through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Enter and Sign Into a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) with Los Baños Doctors Hospital and Medical Center (LBDHMC) for the Continuation of the Referral of Birthing Home Patients Who May Need Emergency Transportation. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR MARK LESTER B. DIZON, 11/28/2022)
